The results show that FAmv achieves competitive, and often superior, performance compared with state-of-the-art mixed-variable optimization algorithms. In addition, experiments on engineering design problems further highlight the robustness and practical applicability of the proposed approach. These results indicate that incorporating appropriate distance formulations into the Firefly Algorithm provides an effective strategy for solving complex mixed-variable optimization problems.

</details>


### [455] [RDEx-SOP: Exploitation-Biased Reconstructed Differential Evolution for Fixed-Budget Bound-Constrained Single-Objective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27089)
*Sichen Tao,Yifei Yang,Ruihan Zhao,Kaiyu Wang,Sicheng Liu,Shangce Gao*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: RDEx-SOP是一种基于成功历史差分进化的算法，专为IEEE CEC 2025数值优化竞赛设计，通过偏向开发的混合分支和轻量级局部扰动，在严格评估预算下平衡快速收敛和最终解质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边界约束单目标数值优化仍然是评估进化算法鲁棒性和效率的关键基准。IEEE CEC 2025数值优化竞赛需要开发能够在严格评估预算下平衡快速收敛和最终解质量的算法。

Method: RDEx-SOP结合了成功历史参数自适应、偏向开发的混合分支和轻量级局部扰动。成功历史参数自适应调整算法参数，偏向开发的混合分支增强局部搜索能力，轻量级局部扰动帮助跳出局部最优。

Result: 在CEC 2025 SOP基准测试中使用U-score框架（速度和精度类别）评估，RDEx-SOP在29个基准函数上表现出强大的整体性能和统计上具有竞争力的最终结果。

Conclusion: RDEx-SOP在IEEE CEC 2025数值优化竞赛中表现出色，通过成功历史参数自适应和偏向开发的混合策略，在严格评估预算下有效平衡了收敛速度和最终解质量。

Abstract: Bound-constrained single-objective numerical optimisation remains a key benchmark for assessing the robustness and efficiency of evolutionary algorithms. This report documents RDEx-SOP, an exploitation-biased success-history differential evolution variant used in the IEEE CEC 2025 numerical optimisation competition (C06 special session). RDEx-SOP combines success-history parameter adaptation, an exploitation-biased hybrid branch, and lightweight local perturbations to balance fast convergence and final solution quality under a strict evaluation budget. We evaluate RDEx-SOP on the official CEC 2025 SOP benchmark with the U-score framework (Speed and Accuracy categories). Experimental results show that RDEx-SOP achieves strong overall performance and statistically competitive final outcomes across the 29 benchmark functions.

</details>


### [456] [RDEx-CSOP: Feasibility-Aware Reconstructed Differential Evolution with Adaptive epsilon-Constraint Ranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27090)
*Sichen Tao,Yifei Yang,Ruihan Zhao,Kaiyu Wang,Sicheng Liu,Shangce Gao*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: RDEx-CSOP是一种用于约束单目标数值优化的差分进化变体，在IEEE CEC 2025竞赛中表现最佳，结合了成功历史参数自适应、偏向开发的混合搜索和ε约束处理机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 约束单目标数值优化需要在有限的评估预算下同时满足可行性维护和强目标值收敛的需求，IEEE CEC 2025竞赛为此提出了专门的基准测试。

Method: RDEx-CSOP结合了成功历史参数自适应、偏向开发的混合搜索策略，以及带有时间变化阈值的ε约束处理机制。

Result: 在CEC 2025 CSOP基准测试的28个函数上，RDEx-CSOP获得了最高的总分和最佳的平均排名，主要得益于其强大的速度和竞争力的约束处理性能。

Conclusion: RDEx-CSOP在约束单目标数值优化问题上表现出色，特别是在速度和约束处理方面具有优势，是IEEE CEC 2025竞赛中表现最佳的算法。

Abstract: Constrained single-objective numerical optimisation requires both feasibility maintenance and strong objective-value convergence under limited evaluation budgets. This report documents RDEx-CSOP, a constrained differential evolution variant used in the IEEE CEC 2025 numerical optimisation competition (C06 special session). RDEx-CSOP combines success-history parameter adaptation with an exploitation-biased hybrid search and an ε-constraint handling mechanism with a time-varying threshold. We evaluate RDEx-CSOP on the official CEC 2025 CSOP benchmark using the U-score framework (Speed, Accuracy, and Constraint categories). The results show that RDEx-CSOP achieves the highest total score and the best average rank among all released comparison algorithms, mainly through strong speed and competitive constraint-handling performance across the 28 benchmark functions.

</details>


### [457] [RDEx-MOP: Indicator-Guided Reconstructed Differential Evolution for Fixed-Budget Multiobjective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27092)
*Sichen Tao,Yifei Yang,Ruihan Zhao,Kaiyu Wang,Sicheng Liu,Shangce Gao*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: RDEx-MOP在CEC 2025多目标优化竞赛中表现最佳，通过集成指标选择、小生境维护和互补差分进化算子，在固定评估预算下快速达到目标区域并获得最高总分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CEC 2025多目标优化竞赛不仅评估最终IGD值，还关注算法在固定评估预算下快速达到目标区域的能力，需要开发能同时满足这两个要求的算法。

Method: RDEx-MOP集成了指标驱动的环境选择、小生境维护的帕累托候选集，以及用于探索和开发的互补差分进化算子。

Result: 在CEC 2025 MOP基准测试中，RDEx-MOP获得了最高总分和最佳平均排名，优于所有已发布的对比算法，包括早期的RDEx基线。

Conclusion: RDEx-MOP在CEC 2025多目标优化竞赛中表现出色，证明了其集成策略的有效性，能够快速收敛到高质量解集。

Abstract: Multiobjective optimisation in the CEC 2025 MOP track is evaluated not only by final IGD values but also by how quickly an algorithm reaches the target region under a fixed evaluation budget. This report documents RDEx-MOP, the reconstructed differential evolution variant used in the IEEE CEC 2025 numerical optimisation competition (C06 special session) bound-constrained multiobjective track. RDEx-MOP integrates indicator-based environmental selection, a niche-maintained Pareto-candidate set, and complementary differential evolution operators for exploration and exploitation. We evaluate RDEx-MOP on the official CEC 2025 MOP benchmark using the released checkpoint traces and the median-target U-score framework. Experimental results show that RDEx-MOP achieves the highest total score and the best average rank among all released comparison algorithms, including the earlier RDEx baseline.

</details>


### [458] [Persistent Memory Through Triple-Loop Consolidation in a Non-Gradient Dissipative Cognitive Architecture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27188)
*Jianwei Lou*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出Deep Memory (DM)，一种用于非梯度耗散认知架构的持久记忆机制，通过三重循环巩固周期实现，在MoE离散路由下实现专家专业化记忆。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 耗散认知架构中单元会因能量耗尽而被随机替换，这破坏了可学习状态，使得持久、上下文特定的记忆难以维持。现有基于梯度的记忆机制不适用于非梯度耗散系统。

Method: 提出Deep Memory (DM)机制，包含三重循环巩固周期：1) 记录专家特定内容质心；2) 用存储的表征种子替换单元；3) 通过持续重入实现稳定。需要MoE离散路由防止质心收敛。

Result: 在约970次模拟实验中：离散路由对专家专业化是必要的；DM实现R=0.984的记忆保持；连续种子能在干扰后重建表征；机制在特定参数范围内有效；记录×种子是关键最小对；DM优于非梯度基线方法。

Conclusion: DM为非梯度认知系统提供了一种可证伪的持久记忆机制，功能上类似于海马体巩固，解决了耗散系统中记忆持久性的基本挑战。

Abstract: Dissipative cognitive architectures maintain computation through continuous energy expenditure, where units that exhaust their energy are stochastically replaced with fresh random state. This creates a fundamental challenge: how can persistent, context-specific memory survive when all learnable state is periodically destroyed? Existing memory mechanisms -- including elastic weight consolidation, synaptic intelligence, and surprise-driven gating -- rely on gradient computation and are inapplicable to non-gradient dissipative systems.
  We introduce Deep Memory (DM), a non-gradient persistent memory mechanism operating through a triple-loop consolidation cycle: (1) recording of expert-specific content centroids, (2) seeding of replaced units with stored representations, and (3) stabilization through continuous re-entry. We demonstrate that discrete expert routing via Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) gating is a causal prerequisite for DM, preventing centroid convergence that would render stored memories identical.
  Across ${\sim}970$ simulation runs spanning thirteen experimental blocks: (i) discrete routing is causally necessary for specialization ($\text{MI}=1.10$ vs. $0.001$; $n=91$); (ii) DM achieves $R=0.984$ vs. $0.385$ without memory ($n=16$); (iii) continuous seeding reconstructs representations after interference ($R_\mathrm{recon}=0.978$; one-shot fails; $n=30$); (iv) the mechanism operates within a characterized $(K,p)$ envelope ($n=350$); (v) recording $\times$ seeding is the minimal critical dyad ($n=40$); (vi) DM outperforms non-gradient baselines (Hopfield, ESN) under matched turnover ($n=370$). These results establish DM as a falsifiable mechanism for persistent memory in non-gradient cognitive systems, with functional parallels to hippocampal consolidation.

</details>


### [459] [A Novel Immune Algorithm for Multiparty Multiobjective Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27541)
*Kesheng Chen,Wenjian Luo,Qi Zhou,Yujiang liu,Peilan Xu,Yuhui Shi*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出一种名为MPIA的多方免疫算法，用于解决多方多目标优化问题，通过跨方引导交叉和自适应激活策略，在合成问题和实际无人机路径规划问题上优于现有算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多目标优化问题无法有效处理涉及多个决策者的实际场景，这类问题被归类为多方多目标优化问题，需要找到同时接近各方帕累托前沿的解决方案。

Method: 提出MPIA算法，包含：1) 基于个体在不同决策者视角下非支配排序的跨方引导交叉策略；2) 基于提出的多方覆盖度量的自适应激活策略，以激活合适个体、保持种群多样性并增强搜索能力。

Result: 在合成多方多目标问题和实际双方案人机路径规划问题上，MPIA相比普通多目标进化算法和最先进的多方多目标进化算法表现更优。

Conclusion: MPIA算法能有效解决多方多目标优化问题，通过创新的交叉和激活策略，在搜索能力和多样性保持方面表现出色，优于现有方法。

Abstract: Traditional multiobjective optimization problems (MOPs) are insufficiently equipped for scenarios involving multiple decision makers (DMs), which are prevalent in many practical applications. These scenarios are categorized as multiparty multiobjective optimization problems (MPMOPs). For MPMOPs, the goal is to find a solution set that is as close to the Pareto front of each DM as much as possible. This poses challenges for evolutionary algorithms in terms of searching and selecting. To better solve MPMOPs, this paper proposes a novel approach called the multiparty immune algorithm (MPIA). The MPIA incorporates an inter-party guided crossover strategy based on the individual's non-dominated sorting ranks from different DM perspectives and an adaptive activation strategy based on the proposed multiparty cover metric (MCM). These strategies enable MPIA to activate suitable individuals for the next operations, maintain population diversity from different DM perspectives, and enhance the algorithm's search capability. To evaluate the performance of MPIA, we compare it with ordinary multiobjective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) and state-of-the-art multiparty multiobjective optimization evolutionary algorithms (MPMOEAs) by solving synthetic multiparty multiobjective problems and real-world biparty multiobjective unmanned aerial vehicle path planning (BPUAV-PP) problems involving multiple DMs. Experimental results demonstrate that MPIA outperforms other algorithms.

</details>


### [460] [The role of neuromorphic principles in the future of biomedicine and healthcare](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27716)
*Grace M. Hwang,Jessica D. Falcone,Joseph D. Monaco,Courtney R. Pinard,Jessica A. Mollick,Roger L. Miller,Stephanie L. Gage,Andrey V. Kanaev,Margaret Kim,R. Ale Lukaszew,Steven M. Zehnder,David Rampulla*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 神经形态工程在生物医学领域的现状、挑战与发展策略研讨会总结


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经形态工程经过40年发展已成熟，目前正经历爆发式增长，有潜力变革生物医学工程和神经技术领域。为了推动该领域在生物医学应用中的发展，需要评估现状、识别挑战并制定战略。

Method: 通过2024年10月举办的"神经形态原理在生物医学与医疗保健"研讨会，汇集了学术界、工业界、临床医生和资助机构等多方代表，通过公开讨论、演讲和资料分享（视频、文字记录和幻灯片）来评估领域现状。

Result: 研讨会汇集了广泛社区代表，讨论了该领域的现状、当前和未来挑战，并制定了推进神经形态研究和生物医学应用发展的策略。所有会议资料已公开提供。

Conclusion: 神经形态工程在生物医学领域具有巨大潜力，通过社区协作、知识共享和战略规划，可以加速该领域的发展和应用转化，推动生物医学工程和神经技术的变革。

Abstract: Neuromorphic engineering has matured over the past four decades and is currently experiencing explosive growth with the potential to transform biomedical engineering and neurotechnologies. Participants at the Neuromorphic Principles in Biomedicine and Healthcare (NPBH) Workshop (October 2024) -- representing a broad cross-section of the community, including early-career and established scholars, engineers, scientists, clinicians, industry, and funders -- convened to discuss the state of the field, current and future challenges, and strategies for advancing neuromorphic research and development for biomedical applications. Publicly approved recordings with transcripts (https://2024.neuro-med.org/program/session-video-and-transcripts) and slides (https://2024.neuro-med.org/program/session-slides) can be found at the workshop website.

</details>


### [461] [Evolutionary Algorithms for Generating Graphs Matching Desired Laplacian Spectra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28151)
*Hendrik Richter,Frank Neumann*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出一种基于拉普拉斯图谱描述符的进化算法，用于生成具有特定高阶属性但结构多样的图


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在建模和优化任务中，需要能够生成具有共享属性但结构不同的图，用于算法选择和配置。然而，构建在广泛图类中保持高阶属性的图仍然是一个挑战

Method: 使用拉普拉斯图谱描述符作为适应度函数的一部分，通过进化算法演化图，使其向目标描述符收敛，同时保持非谱图度量（如路径长度、聚类系数和介数中心性）的多样性

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在不同图类和广泛的拉普拉斯图谱范围内都能成功生成符合要求的图

Conclusion: 提出的进化方法能够有效生成具有特定高阶属性但结构多样的图，为解决图生成中的属性保持问题提供了新思路

Abstract: Graphs with diverse structural characteristics play a central role in modelling and optimization tasks. The ability to generate different types of graphs that exhibit shared properties is likewise essential for algorithm selection and configuration. However, constructing graphs that preserve high-level properties across a broad range of graph classes remains a challenging problem. We present a novel evolutionary approach to evolve graphs based on the Laplacian graph spectra descriptor. This descriptor can be used as part of a fitness function to evaluate graphs according to their desired high-level properties. Our evolutionary algorithm evolves graphs towards this descriptor in order to obtain graphs having properties that are consistent with it but are different from each other in terms of non-spectral graph metrics, such as path length, clustering coefficient and betweenness centrality. Our experimental results show that our approach is successful for different classes of graphs and a wide range of Laplacian graph spectra.

</details>


### [462] [Framework for identifying the equivalence between Nature-Inspired Metaheuristics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28255)
*Iztok Fister,Žan Hozjan,Iztok Fister,,Damjan Strnad*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种评估自然启发元启发式算法相似性的强等价定理，并开发了识别算法等价性的框架，证明在有限计算环境下实现知名算法间高度相似性很困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 元启发式优化领域涌现了大量基于新自然隐喻但缺乏方法论创新的算法，批评者认为所有新算法都只是已有算法的复制。作者试图证明情况并非如此黑白分明，需要更客观的相似性评估方法。

Method: 定义了强等价定理，通过表型和基因型特征向量的余弦相似度来评估算法相似性；开发了识别自然启发元启发式算法等价性的框架。

Result: 实验表明，在有限计算环境下，要实现知名自然启发元启发式算法之间的高度相似性非常困难，甚至不可能。

Conclusion: 并非所有新算法都只是已有算法的简单复制，需要更精细的相似性评估方法来区分真正的创新与重复。

Abstract: The domain of metaheuristic optimization has become vibrant due to a flood of new algorithms using a new nature-inspired metaphor but lacking clear methodological novelty. The Criticism behind the development of these algorithms has reached such an extent that the critics started to assert that all novel algorithms are only copies of already developed ones. In this study, we try to show that the situation is not so black and white. Therefore, we define a strong equivalence theorem for estimating the similarity between two nature-inspired metaheuristics, according to which two algorithms are equivalent if, and only if, the cosine similarity of their phenotypic and genotypic feature vectors, characterizing their behavior by searching for the optimal solutions, is above some threshold. On the theorem basis, a framework is developed for identifying the equivalence between nature-inspired metaheuristics. Extensive experimental work using the framework has shown that searching for conditions to achieve the high similarity of the more well-known nature-inspired metaheuristics is hard, or even not possible to achieve, in the limited computational environments.

</details>


### [463] [BACE: LLM-based Code Generation through Bayesian Anchored Co-Evolution of Code and Test Populations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28653)
*Kaushitha Silva,Srinath Perera*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: BACE框架通过贝叶斯协同进化方法，将代码生成重新定义为代码和测试种群的协同进化过程，利用噪声测试信号引导搜索，显著提升LLM代码生成性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体框架依赖生成的测试作为绝对真值存在缺陷：错误代码可能通过有缺陷的测试，而有效解决方案可能被错误断言降级。虽然新方法放弃了测试生成，但作者认为生成的测试作为噪声信号仍有价值。

Method: 提出BACE框架，将合成重新定义为贝叶斯协同进化过程：代码和测试种群协同进化，通过贝叶斯更新基于噪声交互证据相互引导。通过锚定在最小公共示例上，防止自验证循环中的协同进化漂移。

Result: 在LiveCodeBench v6（2025年3月后）上的广泛评估显示，BACE在专有模型和开源小语言模型上都实现了卓越性能。

Conclusion: 通过将生成的测试建模为噪声传感器并采用贝叶斯协同进化方法，BACE框架能够有效利用测试信号，显著提升代码生成质量，解决了传统自验证循环的局限性。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in code generation. While an interactive feedback loop can improve performance, writing effective tests is a non-trivial task. Early multi-agent frameworks, such as AgentCoder, automated this process but relied on generated tests as absolute ground truth. This approach is fragile: incorrect code frequently passes faulty or trivial tests, while valid solutions are often degraded to satisfy incorrect assertions. Addressing this limitation, newer methods have largely abandoned test generation in favor of planning and reasoning based on examples. We argue, however, that generated tests remain a valuable signal if we model them as noisy sensors guided by bayesian updates. To this end, we introduce BACE (Bayesian Anchored Co-Evolution), a framework that reformulates synthesis as a Bayesian co-evolutionary process where code and test populations are evolved, guided by belief distributions that are reciprocally updated based on noisy interaction evidence. By anchoring this search on minimal public examples, BACE prevents the co-evolutionary drift typical of self-validating loops. Extensive evaluations on LiveCodeBench v6 (post-March 2025) reveal that BACE achieves superior performance across both proprietary models and open-weight small language models.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [464] [MAR3: Multi-Agent Recognition, Reasoning, and Reflection for Reference Audio-Visual Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27706)
*Yuan Zhao,Zhenqi Jia,Yongqiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出MAR3框架，通过多智能体识别、推理和反思机制，无需训练即可实现高质量的参考音频-视觉分割，在Ref-AVSBench数据集上达到69.2%的J&F分数，超越SOTA 3.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有参考音频-视觉分割方法存在三个主要问题：1) 忽视对表达式难度和主导模态的显式识别；2) 过度依赖指令调优数据集进行对象推理；3) 缺乏对分割结果的反思验证，导致错误的掩码预测。

Method: 提出MAR3框架：1) 共识多模态识别机制，让LLM智能体显式识别参考表达式的难度和多模态线索的主导模态；2) 自适应协作对象推理策略，基于模态主导难度规则可靠推理目标对象；3) 反思学习分割机制，通过检查智能体验证中间分割结果并迭代修正分割智能体的对象文本提示。

Result: 在Ref-AVSBench数据集上达到69.2%的J&F分数，绝对超越当前最佳方法3.4%。

Conclusion: MAR3框架通过多智能体识别、推理和反思机制，有效解决了现有参考音频-视觉分割方法的局限性，实现了高质量的分割性能，且无需额外训练。

Abstract: Reference Audio-Visual Segmentation (Ref-AVS) aims to segment objects in audible videos based on multimodal cues in reference expressions. Previous methods overlook the explicit recognition of expression difficulty and dominant modality in multimodal cues, over-rely on the quality of the instruction-tuning dataset for object reasoning, and lack reflective validation of segmentation results, leading to erroneous mask predictions. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel training-free Multi-Agent Recognition, Reasoning, and Reflection framework to achieve high-quality Reference Audio-Visual Segmentation, termed MAR3. Incorporating the sociological Delphi theory to achieve robust analysis, a Consensus Multimodal Recognition mechanism is proposed that enables LLM agents to explicitly recognize the difficulty of reference expressions and the dominant modality of multimodal cues. Based on our modality-dominant difficulty rule, we propose an adaptive Collaborative Object Reasoning strategy to reliably reason about the referred object. To further ensure precise mask prediction, we develop a Reflective Learning Segmentation mechanism, in which a check agent examines intermediate segmentation results and iteratively corrects the object text prompt of the segment agent. Experiments demonstrate that MAR3 achieves superior performance (69.2% in J&F) on the Ref-AVSBench dataset, outperforming SOTA by 3.4% absolutely.

</details>


### [465] [Is One-Shot In-Context Learning Helpful for Data Selection in Task-Specific Fine-Tuning of Multimodal LLMs?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28058)
*Xiao An,Jiaxing Sun,Ting Hu,Wei He*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: CLIPPER是一个训练免费的数据选择框架，通过分离参数知识和世界知识，利用上下文学习来识别核心数据集，在显著降低计算成本的同时达到全量微调的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在向多模态大语言模型注入领域知识时面临可扩展性问题：任务特定微调在数据集增长时需要在性能和计算开销之间权衡；现有数据选择方法要么依赖额外评分模型，要么使用启发式聚类，未能同时关注数据重要性和多样性，且忽略了训练样本间的相互作用。

Method: CLIPPER采用训练免费的数据选择流程：1) 分离参数知识和世界知识；2) 利用上下文学习探测模型对不同演示-查询组合的响应；3) 识别能反映原始数据集困惑度分布的核心集，既保留关键样本又保持多样性。

Result: 在两个MLLM（Qwen2.5-VL-7B和Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct）和三个数据集上的实验表明：CLIPPER在显著降低成本的情况下匹配全量微调性能，Qwen2.5-VL-7B在VRSBench上达到47%的数据效率，Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct在ScienceQA上减少37%的训练时间。

Conclusion: CLIPPER提供了一种高效的数据选择方法，解决了多模态大语言模型领域知识注入中的可扩展性问题，通过训练免费的核心集识别，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。

Abstract: Injecting world knowledge into pretrained multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is essential for domain-specific applications. Task-specific fine-tuning achieves this by tailoring MLLMs to high-quality in-domain data but encounters scalability challenges as datasets grow, necessitating a trade-off between performance and computational overhead. Existing data selection methods rely on additional scoring models or heuristic clustering, failing to concentrate on both data importance and diversity. Moreover, both methods overlook the interplay among training samples. To address these limitations, we propose CLIPPER, a training-free data selection pipeline that separates parameter and world knowledge, and leverages in-context learning to probe model responses to different demonstration-query combinations. CLIPPER identifies coresets that mirror the original dataset's perplexity distribution, preserving critical samples while maintaining diversity. Experiments on two MLLMs and three datasets show that CLIPPER matches full fine-tuning performance with significantly lower costs: Qwen2.5-VL-7B attains 47% data efficiency on VRSBench, and Llama-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct reduces ScienceQA training time by 37%.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [466] [On the Carbon Footprint of Economic Research in the Age of Generative AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26712)
*Andres Alonso-Robisco,Carlos Esparcia,Francisco Jareño*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文将绿色AI分析单位从模型转向工作流程，将提示视为决策策略，通过操作约束和决策规则提示显著减少AI辅助编码的碳足迹，同时保持输出质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI越来越多地用于编写和重构研究代码，但现有绿色AI研究主要关注模型本身的碳足迹，而忽略了使用GenAI作为工具的下游工作流程。需要将分析单位从模型转向工作流程，研究如何通过提示设计来平衡研究效率与环境影响。

Method: 1. 对近期绿色AI文献进行主题映射，识别七大主题；2. 以现代经济调查工作流程为基准，使用LDA文献映射方法，通过GenAI辅助编码在固定云笔记本中实现；3. 使用CodeCarbon测量运行时间和估计CO2e排放；4. 比较不同类型提示（通用绿色语言、操作约束、决策规则）对环境足迹的影响。

Result: 1. 文献分析显示训练足迹是最大主题，推理效率和系统级优化增长迅速；2. 基准测试表明：注入通用绿色语言提示对碳足迹无可靠影响，而操作约束和决策规则提示能显著且稳定地减少环境足迹，同时保持决策等效的主题输出质量。

Conclusion: 人类在环治理是协调GenAI生产力与环境效率的实际杠杆。通过将提示视为决策策略，研究人员可以在保持研究质量的同时，通过设计适当的操作约束和决策规则来显著减少AI辅助工作流程的碳足迹。

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly used to write and refactor research code, expanding computational workflows. At the same time, Green AI research has largely measured the footprint of models rather than the downstream workflows in which GenAI is a tool. We shift the unit of analysis from models to workflows and treat prompts as decision policies that allocate discretion between researcher and system, governing what is executed and when iteration stops. We contribute in two ways. First, we map the recent Green AI literature into seven themes: training footprint is the largest cluster, while inference efficiency and system level optimisation are growing rapidly, alongside measurement protocols, green algorithms, governance, and security and efficiency trade-offs. Second, we benchmark a modern economic survey workflow, an LDA-based literature mapping implemented with GenAI assisted coding and executed in a fixed cloud notebook, measuring runtime and estimated CO2e with CodeCarbon. Injecting generic green language into prompts has no reliable effect, whereas operational constraints and decision rule prompts deliver large and stable footprint reductions while preserving decision equivalent topic outputs. The results identify human in the loop governance as a practical lever to align GenAI productivity with environmental efficiency.

</details>


### [467] [GISclaw: An Open-Source LLM-Powered Agent System for Full-Stack Geospatial Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26845)
*Jinzhen Han,JinByeong Lee,Yuri Shim,Jisung Kim,Jae-Joon Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: GISclaw是一个开源GIS智能体系统，通过集成LLM推理核心、Python沙箱和开源GIS库，支持向量、栅格和表格数据的全栈地理空间分析，在GeoAnalystBench基准上达到96%的任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的GIS智能体存在数据类型覆盖有限（仅向量）、依赖专有GIS平台、单模型架构无法进行系统比较等问题，需要开发更全面、开放、可比较的GIS分析系统。

Method: 1) 集成LLM推理核心与持久Python沙箱；2) 使用开源GIS库（GeoPandas, rasterio等）；3) 实现两种可插拔智能体架构（单智能体ReAct循环和双智能体计划-执行-重规划管道）；4) 支持六种异构LLM后端；5) 引入三大工程创新：模式分析、领域知识注入和错误记忆机制。

Result: 在50个任务的GeoAnalystBench基准上达到96%的任务成功率。系统评估600个模型-架构-任务组合显示，双智能体架构对强模型有负面影响，但对弱模型有边际收益。提出三层评估协议用于全面GIS智能体评估。

Conclusion: GISclaw通过开放架构、全面数据支持和工程创新，成功解决了现有GIS智能体的局限性，为自动化地理空间分析提供了强大、可扩展的平台，所有代码均已公开。

Abstract: The convergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Geographic Information Science has opened new avenues for automating complex geospatial analysis. However, existing LLM-powered GIS agents are constrained by limited data-type coverage (vector-only), reliance on proprietary GIS platforms, and single-model architectures that preclude systematic comparisons. We present GISclaw, an open-source agent system that integrates an LLM reasoning core with a persistent Python sandbox, a comprehensive suite of open-source GIS libraries (GeoPandas, rasterio, scipy, scikit-learn), and a web-based interactive interface for full-stack geospatial analysis spanning vector, raster, and tabular data. GISclaw implements two pluggable agent architectures -- a Single Agent ReAct loop and a Dual Agent Plan-Execute-Replan pipeline -- and supports six heterogeneous LLM backends ranging from cloud-hosted flagship models (GPT-5.4) to locally deployed 14B models on consumer GPUs. Through three key engineering innovations -- Schema Analysis bridging the task-data information gap, Domain Knowledge injection for domain-specific workflows, and an Error Memory mechanism for intelligent self-correction -- GISclaw achieves up to 96% task success on the 50-task GeoAnalystBench benchmark. Systematic evaluation across 600 model--architecture--task combinations reveals that the Dual Agent architecture consistently degrades strong models while providing marginal gains for weaker ones. We further propose a three-layer evaluation protocol incorporating code structure analysis, reasoning process assessment, and type-specific output verification for comprehensive GIS agent assessment. The system and all evaluation code are publicly available.

</details>


### [468] [EZASP -- Facilitating the usage of ASP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26863)
*Rafael Martins,Matthias Knorr,Ricardo Gonçalves*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EZASP是一个Visual Studio Code扩展，支持遵循Easy ASP方法开发ASP程序，提供语法高亮、错误检测和程序重构功能，旨在降低ASP学习难度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ASP作为一种声明式编程语言，在解决复杂组合问题方面很成功，但学习曲线陡峭。Easy ASP方法虽然有助于学习，但目前缺乏支持工具。本文旨在填补这一空白，开发一个集成Easy ASP方法的开发工具。

Method: 开发了EZASP，一个Visual Studio Code扩展，覆盖并扩展了Easy ASP语言片段。提供语法错误高亮（包括非安全变量检测）、对偏离方法论的警告、自动程序重排序功能，所有功能都可配置和禁用。

Result: EZASP成功实现了对Easy ASP方法的支持，包括语言扩展和开发辅助功能。在大学教学环境中的小型用户研究表明，这些功能对新用户和有经验的用户都有益处。

Conclusion: EZASP是一个有效的工具，通过集成Easy ASP方法论并提供开发辅助功能，降低了ASP的学习难度，为初学者和有经验的开发者都提供了价值。

Abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a declarative programming language used for modeling and solving complex combinatorial problems. It has been successfully applied to a number of different realworld problems. However, learning its usage can prove challenging as the declarative language, from a conceptual perspective, differs substantially from imperative programming, and programs are not required to adhere to any particular structure, offering arguably almost too much freedom for a beginner. Recently, a new methodology called Easy Answer Set Programming (Easy ASP) has been introduced that aims to aid in this learning process by focussing on a well-defined fragment of the ASP language and introducing additional structure to the programs. However, while this methodology can indeed be employed, to the best of our knowledge, no tool integrates its features currently. In this paper, we present EZASP, a Visual Studio Code extension designed to support the development of ASP programs following the Easy ASP methodology. It covers and extends the language fragment of Easy ASP and provides the user with warnings in the case of deviations from the methodology as well as the possibility to automatically reorder the program. Complementarily, it also adds syntax error highlighting, including detection of non-safe variables directly while editing, and configurability, as all features can be optionally disabled. A small user study in the context of university teaching suggests that these features are benefitial for both new and experienced users.

</details>


### [469] [Efficiently Reproducing Distributed Workflows in Notebook-based Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26965)
*Talha Azaz,Raza Ahmad,Md Saiful Islam,Douglas Thain,Tanu Malik*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NBRewind是一个笔记本内核系统，通过审计和重复两个内核实现分布式工作流的高效、可复现执行，支持增量检查点和部分重执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前笔记本中的分布式工作流面临共享和复现挑战，即使小改动也需要端到端重执行，限制了迭代开发。现有方法要么只适用于单节点工作流，要么牺牲了可复现性。

Method: NBRewind包含审计内核和重复内核：审计内核执行增量、单元格级检查点以避免不必要重运行；重复内核重建检查点并支持部分重执行，包括管理分布式工作流的笔记本单元格。两种内核方法都基于跨单元格的数据流分析。

Result: 创建增量检查点仅增加最小开销，并能在HPC系统上实现便携、跨站点的笔记本分布式工作流可复现性。检查点和日志作为标准化笔记本规范的一部分改善了共享和复现。

Conclusion: NBRewind解决了笔记本中分布式工作流的效率和可复现性问题，通过增量检查点和数据流分析实现了高效、可共享的分布式工作流开发环境。

Abstract: Notebooks provide an author-friendly environment for iterative development, modular execution, and easy sharing. Distributed workflows are increasingly being authored and executed in notebooks, yet sharing and reproducing them remains challenging. Even small code or parameter changes often force full end-to-end re-execution of the distributed workflow, limiting iterative development for such workloads. Current methods for improving notebook execution operate on single-node workflows, while optimization techniques for distributed workflows typically sacrifice reproducibility. We introduce NBRewind, a notebook kernel system for efficient, reproducible execution of distributed workflows in notebooks. NBRewind consists of two kernels--audit and repeat. The audit kernel performs incremental, cell-level checkpointing to avoid unnecessary re-runs; repeat reconstructs checkpoints and enables partial re-execution including notebook cells that manage distributed workflow. Both kernel methods are based on data-flow analysis across cells. We show how checkpoints and logs when packaged as part of standardized notebook specification improve sharing and reproducibility. Using real-world case studies we show that creating incremental checkpoints adds minimal overhead and enables portable, cross-site reproducibility of notebook-based distributed workflows on HPC systems.

</details>


### [470] [Round-trip Engineering for Tactical DDD: A Constraint-Based Vision for the Masses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.26987)
*Weixing Zhang,Mario Herb,Martin Armbruster,Bowen Jiang,Marcel Vielsack,Anne Koziolek*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于约束的战术建模环境，将DDD战术模式作为一等建模原语，通过实时约束验证和双向同步机制，降低DDD采用门槛


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用建模语言与DDD战术模式之间存在语义表达鸿沟，导致设计意图与实现持续偏离，需要工具支持来弥合这一差距

Method: 创建DDD原生元模型，将战术模式作为一等建模原语；开发实时约束验证引擎防止架构违规；建立双向同步机制保持模型代码一致性

Result: 提出一个完整的约束驱动战术建模环境框架，旨在将专家级架构知识嵌入建模约束中，支持小型团队和初级开发者

Conclusion: 通过工具支持的验证，将战术DDD从需要持续专家监督的精英实践转变为可访问的工程学科，降低技术门槛

Abstract: Despite Domain-Driven Design's proven value in managing complex business logic, a fundamental semantic expressiveness gap persists between generic modeling languages and tactical DDD patterns, causing continuous divergence between design intent and implementation. We envision a constraint-based tactical modeling environment that transforms abstract architectural principles into explicit, tool-enforced engineering constraints. At its core is a DDD-native metamodel where tactical patterns are first-class modeling primitives, coupled with a real-time constraint verification engine that prevents architectural violations during modeling, and bidirectional synchronization mechanisms that maintain model-code consistency through round-trip engineering. This approach aims to democratize tactical DDD by embedding expert-level architectural knowledge directly into modeling constraints, enabling small teams and junior developers to build complex business systems without sacrificing long-term maintainability. By lowering the technical barriers to DDD adoption, we envision transforming tactical DDD from an elite practice requiring continuous expert oversight into an accessible engineering discipline with tool-supported verification.

</details>


### [471] [Etna: An Evaluation Platform for Property-Based Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27002)
*Alperen Keles,Jessica Shi,Nikhil Kamath,Tin Nam Liu,Ceren Mert,Harrison Goldstein,Benjamin C. Pierce,Leonidas Lampropoulos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ETNA是一个用于经验性评估和比较属性测试技术的平台，整合了多个流行的PBT框架和测试工作负载，通过实验帮助用户理解最佳实践和权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 属性测试在函数式编程中很重要，但存在两个问题：1) 新用户难以从众多工具中选择合适的框架；2) 即使有经验的用户也不清楚在特定情况下哪种测试输入生成策略更好。现有PBT文献虽然创意丰富，但缺乏严格的比较研究来回答这些问题

Method: 开发ETNA平台，整合多个流行的PBT框架（Rocq、Haskell、OCaml、Racket、Rust）和文献中的测试工作负载。平台具有可扩展架构，便于添加新框架，同时自动处理性能测量的技术细节

Result: 使用ETNA平台进行了多项实验，比较了不同PBT方法在不同编程语言中的表现，为用户提供了清晰的性能比较和最佳实践指导

Conclusion: ETNA平台为PBT技术的经验性评估提供了系统化工具，通过实际实验帮助用户理解不同框架和策略的优缺点，填补了PBT文献中缺乏严格比较的空白

Abstract: Property-based testing is a mainstay of functional programming, boasting a rich literature, an enthusiastic user community, and an abundance of tools~ -- so many, indeed, that new users may have difficulty choosing. Moreover, any given framework may support a variety of strategies for generating test inputs; even experienced users may wonder which are better in any given situation. Sadly, the PBT literature, though long on creativity, is short on rigorous comparisons to help answer such questions.
  We present ETNA, a platform for empirical evaluation and comparison of PBT techniques. ETNA incorporates a number of popular PBT frameworks and testing workloads from the literature, and its extensible architecture makes adding new ones easy, while handling the technical drudgery of performance measurement.
  To illustrate its benefits, we use ETNA to carry out several experiments with popular PBT approaches in Rocq, Haskell, OCaml, Racket, and Rust, allowing users to more clearly understand best practices and tradeoffs.

</details>


### [472] [Predicting Program Correctness By Ensemble Semantic Entropy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27098)
*Yunxiang Wei,Tianlin Li,Yuwei Zheng,Yanni Dong,Aishan Liu,Qiang Hu,Xiaoyu Zhang,Mingfei Cheng,Jian Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE)方法，通过跨模型集成评估不确定性，解决LLM生成程序时单模型一致性但错误的问题，显著提升程序正确性预测和推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖单模型多次采样的语义或执行行为一致性来评估不确定性，但单模型可能收敛到一致但错误的解，导致基于一致性的代理指标失效。需要更有效的不确定性估计方法来确保LLM生成程序的正确性。

Method: 提出Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE)，通过评估跨模型集成采样的语义一致性来估计不确定性。还提出Cas框架，利用ESE作为决策信号进行级联测试时缩放，平衡参数和推理缩放。

Result: 在LiveCodeBench上，ESE比单模型语义熵与程序正确性的相关性更强。在严格假阳性率约束的选择性生成任务中，ESE将预测准确率提升53.4%。Cas框架相比单模型缩放减少64.9%的FLOPs同时保持性能。

Conclusion: ESE通过跨模型集成有效解决单模型一致性但错误的问题，显著提升程序正确性预测。Cas框架为平衡参数和推理缩放提供了新视角，在保持性能的同时大幅降低计算成本。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in generating programs from natural language descriptions, yet ensuring their correctness without an external oracle remains a critical challenge. To solve the challenge, existing methods often rely on uncertainty estimation, measuring the consistency of semantics or execution behaviors across multiple samples generated by a single model. However, we observe that a single model can often converge to a consistent but incorrect solution, rendering such consistency-based proxies ineffective. To address this, we propose Ensemble Semantic Entropy (ESE), which estimates uncertainty by evaluating the consistency of samples aggregated across an ensemble of models. Experiments on LiveCodeBench demonstrate that ESE correlates more strongly with program correctness than single-model semantic entropy. Notably, in selective generation tasks with strict false-positive rate constraints, ESE improves prediction accuracy by 53.4%. Furthermore, by leveraging ESE as the decision signal, we propose a cascading test-time scaling framework Cas, which maintains performance while reducing FLOPs by 64.9% compared to single-model scaling, offering a new perspective on balancing parameter and inference scaling.

</details>


### [473] [A Large-Scale Comprehensive Measurement of AI-Generated Code in Real-World Repositories A Large-Scale Comprehensive Measurement of AI-Generated Code in Real-World Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27130)
*Tianhao Mao,Dongfang Zhao,Haixu Tang,Xiaofeng Wang,Hang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文对现实世界代码库中的AI生成代码进行了大规模实证研究，分析了代码级和提交级特征，揭示了AI生成代码与人工编写代码的差异及其对开发实践的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM在软件工程中的广泛应用，AI生成代码越来越多地集成到实际系统中。然而，现有研究主要集中在小型、受控的评估中，缺乏对现实世界环境中AI生成代码的全面分析。理解AI生成代码的特征和影响对于实际系统集成至关重要。

Method: 1. 开发启发式过滤器结合LLM分类来识别AI生成代码；2. 构建大规模数据集；3. 分析代码级指标（如复杂度、结构、缺陷相关指标）；4. 分析提交级特征（如提交大小、频率、提交后稳定性）。

Result: 研究提供了关于AI生成代码与人工编写代码差异的新见解，揭示了AI辅助如何影响开发实践。这些发现有助于更深入地理解AI辅助编程的实际影响。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了AI生成代码在现实世界环境中分析的空白，为理解AI辅助编程的实际意义提供了实证基础，有助于指导未来AI代码生成工具的设计和集成。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly transforming software engineering by enabling developers to generate code ranging from small snippets to entire projects. As AI-generated code becomes increasingly integrated into real-world systems, understanding its characteristics and impact is critical. However, prior work primarily focuses on small-scale, controlled evaluations and lacks comprehensive analysis in real-world settings.
  In this paper, we present a large-scale empirical study of AI-generated code in real-world repositories. We analyze both code-level metrics (\eg complexity, structure, and defect-related indicators) and commit-level characteristics (\eg commit size, frequency, and post-commit stability). To enable this study, we develop heuristic filter with LLM classification to identify AI-generated code and construct a large dataset.
  Our results provide new insights into how AI-generated code differs from human-written code and how AI assistance influences development practices. These findings contribute to a deeper understanding of the practical implications of AI-assisted programming.

</details>


### [474] [The First Issue Matters: Linking Task-Level Characteristics to Long-Term Newcomer Retention in OSS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27136)
*Yichen Hao,Weiwei Xu,Kai Gao,Xiaofang Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究开源社区中新手首次解决问题的特征如何影响其长期留存，发现互动相关特征比问题内在属性更重要，并识别出能提高留存的具体特征组合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有任务推荐方法主要关注帮助新手解决第一个问题，但忽视了第一个问题的特征如何影响新手的长期留存。这限制了我们理解初始成功是否会导致持续参与，也阻碍了有效的入职设计。

Method: 进行大规模实证研究，结合预测分析、可解释性技术和因果推断，估计问题特征对留存结果的因果效应。

Result: 预测任务显示互动相关特征与留存的关联性比内在问题属性更强。因果分析进一步揭示：由中等经验贡献者报告、具有适度讨论强度、项目成员参与、以及中性或略微负面评论情感的问题具有更高的留存潜力。

Conclusion: 研究结果为开源维护者提供了可操作的见解，帮助他们设计更好的问题管理实践以支持新手长期留存。

Abstract: Sustaining newcomer participation is critical for the long-term health of open-source communities. Although prior research has explored various task recommendation approaches to help newcomers resolve their first-issue, these methods overlook how characteristics of first-issues may influence newcomers' long-term retention, limiting our understanding of whether initial success leads to sustained participation and hindering effective onboarding design. In this paper, we conduct a large-scale empirical study to examine how first-issue characteristics affect newcomer retention. We combine predictive analysis, interpretability techniques, and causal inference to estimate the causal effects of issue characteristics on retention outcomes. The prediction task supports the interpretation and shows that interaction-related characteristics exhibit stronger associations with retention than intrinsic issue attributes. The causal analysis further reveals that issues reported by moderately experienced contributors, accompanied by moderate discussion intensity and participation from project members, and neutral or slightly negative comment sentiment, have higher retention potential. These findings provide actionable insights for OSS maintainers on designing issue management practices that better support long-term newcomer retention.

</details>


### [475] [Finding Memory Leaks in C/C++ Programs via Neuro-Symbolic Augmented Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27224)
*Huihui Huang,Jieke Shi,Bo Wang,Zhou Yang,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MemHint：结合LLM语义理解和Z3符号推理的神经符号管道，用于检测C/C++项目中的内存泄漏，通过识别项目特定的内存管理函数和路径敏感分析，显著提高了检测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态分析工具（如CodeQL）在检测内存泄漏时存在两个主要问题：1）无法识别项目特定的自定义内存管理函数；2）缺乏路径敏感的控制流建模，导致漏报率高。

Method: MemHint采用神经符号管道：1）使用LLM分析代码库，将函数分类为内存分配器、释放器或无关函数，生成函数摘要；2）使用Z3验证摘要的路径可行性；3）将验证后的摘要注入CodeQL和Infer；4）使用Z3路径可行性过滤消除不可行路径的警告；5）最后用LLM验证剩余警告是否为真实bug。

Result: 在7个真实C/C++项目（总计超过340万行代码）中，MemHint检测到52个独特内存泄漏（47个已确认/修复，4个CVE已提交），成本约为每个bug 1.7美元。相比之下，原生CodeQL检测到19个，原生Infer检测到3个。

Conclusion: MemHint通过结合LLM的语义理解和Z3的符号推理，有效解决了静态分析工具在检测内存泄漏时的局限性，显著提高了检测效果和实用性。

Abstract: Memory leaks remain prevalent in real-world C/C++ software. Static analyzers such as CodeQL provide scalable program analysis but frequently miss such bugs because they cannot recognize project-specific custom memory-management functions and lack path-sensitive control-flow modeling. We present MemHint, a neuro-symbolic pipeline that addresses both limitations by combining LLMs' semantic understanding of code with Z3-based symbolic reasoning. MemHint parses the target codebase and applies an LLM to classify each function as a memory allocator, deallocator, or neither, producing function summaries that record which argument or return value carries memory ownership, extending the analyzer's built-in knowledge beyond standard primitives such as malloc and free. A Z3-based validation step checks each summary against the function's control-flow graph, discarding those whose claimed memory operation is unreachable on any feasible path. The validated summaries are injected into CodeQL and Infer via their respective extension mechanisms. Z3 path feasibility filtering then eliminates warnings on infeasible paths, and a final LLM-based validation step confirms whether each remaining warning is a genuine bug. On seven real-world C/C++ projects totaling over 3.4M lines of code, MemHint detects 52 unique memory leaks (47 confirmed/fixed, 4 CVEs submitted) at approximately $1.7 per detected bug, compared to 19 by vanilla CodeQL and 3 by vanilla Infer.

</details>


### [476] ["An Endless Stream of AI Slop": The Growing Burden of AI-Assisted Software Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27249)
*Sebastian Baltes,Marc Cheong,Christoph Treude*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究通过分析Reddit和Hacker News上的1154个帖子，探讨开发者对低质量AI生成内容（AI slop）的认知和应对，识别出三大主题：审查摩擦、质量下降、系统动力与后果，将AI slop视为"公地悲剧"问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI生成内容在软件开发中的普及，低质量的AI生成内容（AI slop）对代码、文档、bug报告等产生负面影响，但缺乏关于开发者如何感知和应对这一现象的实证研究。

Method: 对Reddit和Hacker News上15个讨论线程中的1154个帖子进行定性分析，开发包含15个代码的代码本，组织成三个主题集群。

Result: 识别出三大主题集群：1) 审查摩擦（AI slop增加审查负担、侵蚀信任、引发应对措施）；2) 质量下降（损害代码库、知识资源、开发者能力）；3) 系统动力与后果（系统性激励、强制采用、技艺侵蚀、劳动力破坏）。将AI slop框架化为"公地悲剧"。

Conclusion: AI slop作为公地悲剧问题，个体生产力提升将成本外部化给审查者、维护者和社区。研究提供了开发者关注点和缓解策略，为工具开发者、团队领导和教育者提供可行见解。

Abstract: "AI slop", that is, low-quality AI-generated content, is increasingly affecting software development, from generated code and pull requests to documentation and bug reports. However, there is limited empirical research on how developers perceive and respond to this phenomenon. We conducted a qualitative analysis of 1,154 posts across 15 discussion threads from Reddit and Hacker News, developing a codebook of 15 codes organized into three thematic clusters: Review Friction (how AI slop burdens reviewers, erodes trust, and prompts countermeasures), Quality Degradation (damage to codebases, knowledge resources, and developer competence), and Forces and Consequences (systemic incentives, mandated adoption, craft erosion, and workforce disruption). Our findings frame AI slop as a tragedy of the commons, where individual productivity gains externalize costs onto reviewers, maintainers, and the broader community. We report the concerns developers raise and the mitigation strategies they propose, offering actionable insights for tool developers, team leads, and educators.

</details>


### [477] [Codebase-Memory: Tree-Sitter-Based Knowledge Graphs for LLM Code Exploration via MCP](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27277)
*Martin Vogel,Falk Meyer-Eschenbach,Severin Kohler,Elias Grünewald,Felix Balzer*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Codebase-Memory是一个基于知识图谱的LLM代码代理系统，通过Tree-Sitter解析66种语言构建持久化知识图谱，相比传统文件探索方法，在保持83%回答质量的同时，减少90%的token消耗和2.1倍的工具调用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM代码代理通过重复文件读取和grep搜索探索代码库，每次查询消耗数千token且缺乏结构化理解。需要一种更高效、结构化的代码库理解方法。

Method: 基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)构建持久化知识图谱，使用Tree-Sitter解析66种语言，采用多阶段流水线处理，包括并行工作池、调用图遍历、影响分析和社区发现。

Result: 在31个真实代码库评估中：1) 达到83%回答质量（相比文件探索代理的92%）；2) 减少90%的token消耗；3) 减少2.1倍的工具调用；4) 在图原生查询（如枢纽检测和调用者排名）中，在19/31种语言上匹配或超越探索代理。

Conclusion: Codebase-Memory通过知识图谱方法显著提高了代码库探索的效率，在保持较高回答质量的同时大幅减少了资源消耗，特别适合图原生查询任务。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) coding agents typically explore codebases through repeated file-reading and grep-searching, consuming thousands of tokens per query without structural understanding. We present Codebase-Memory, an open-source system that constructs a persistent, Tree-Sitter-based knowledge graph via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), parsing 66 languages through a multi-phase pipeline with parallel worker pools, call-graph traversal, impact analysis, and community discovery. Evaluated across 31 real-world repositories, Codebase-Memory achieves 83% answer quality versus 92% for a file-exploration agent, at ten times fewer tokens and 2.1 times fewer tool calls. For graph-native queries such as hub detection and caller ranking, it matches or exceeds the explorer on 19 of 31 languages.

</details>


### [478] [A Multi-agent AI System for Deep Learning Model Migration from TensorFlow to JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27296)
*Stoyan Nikolov,Bernhard Konrad,Moritz Gronbach,Niket Kumar,Ann Yan,Varun Singh,Yaning Liang,Parthasarathy Ranganathan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于AI的多智能体系统，用于将TensorFlow深度学习模型自动迁移到JAX框架，实现了6.4-8倍的加速，并展示了AI如何支持自身开发工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI产品和模型的快速发展，深度学习框架不断更新。Google在众多产品中使用机器学习，但维护不同ML框架和版本的模型源代码是一个重大挑战。目前迁移工作主要依赖人工专家，效率低下。

Method: 构建了一个基于AI的多智能体系统：1）使用结合静态分析和AI指令的规划器为复杂代码组件创建迁移计划；2）定义质量指标和基于AI的评判器来评估无测试代码；3）通过编排器和编码器执行迁移，使用AI生成的示例剧本。

Result: 系统在大型超大规模环境中显著加速了代码迁移（6.4-8倍加速），成功处理了商业实际用例，并创建了AI支持自身开发工作流的良性循环。

Conclusion: 该方法显著减少了深度学习模型迁移时间，所描述的技术和方法可以推广到其他框架迁移和通用代码转换任务中。

Abstract: The rapid development of AI-based products and their underlying models has led to constant innovation in deep learning frameworks. Google has been pioneering machine learning usage across dozens of products. Maintaining the multitude of model source codes in different ML frameworks and versions is a significant challenge. So far the maintenance and migration work was done largely manually by human experts. We describe an AI-based multi-agent system that we built to support automatic migration of TensorFlow-based deep learning models into JAX-based ones. We make three main contributions: First, we show how an AI planner that uses a mix of static analysis with AI instructions can create migration plans for very complex code components that are reliably followed by the combination of an orchestrator and coders, using AI-generated example-based playbooks. Second, we define quality metrics and AI-based judges that accelerate development when the code to evaluate has no tests and has to adhere to strict style and dependency requirements. Third, we demonstrate how the system accelerates code migrations in a large hyperscaler environment on commercial real-world use-cases. Our approach dramatically reduces the time (6.4x-8x speedup) for deep learning model migrations and creates a virtuous circle where effectively AI supports its own development workflow. We expect that the techniques and approaches described here can be generalized for other framework migrations and general code transformation tasks.

</details>


### [479] [Unveiling Code Clones in the Eclipse IIoT Software Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27308)
*Zengyang Li,Binbin Huang,Yimeng Li,Ran Mo,Peng Liang,Hui Liu,Yutao Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究调查了Eclipse IIoT开源项目中代码克隆的普遍性、演变和共同修改情况，发现克隆代码比例高达16.3%，是传统开源项目的近两倍，可能对软件维护产生负面影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业物联网开源项目中代码克隆现象普遍，开发者为了效率经常重用代码和配置，但代码克隆对IIoT OSS领域的影响尚未得到充分研究，需要了解其普遍性、演变和共同修改情况。

Method: 收集了Eclipse IIoT OSS生态系统中15个项目的90个发布版本，使用NiCad工具和自定义分析模块，基于源代码和变更历史调查代码克隆情况，涵盖克隆分布、模式、演变趋势、共同修改克隆和跨项目克隆。

Result: 1) Eclipse IIoT OSS项目中代码克隆普遍，16.3%的代码行涉及克隆，是传统OSS项目的近两倍；2) 大多数克隆发生在提交之间，但仍有相当比例的克隆对发生在单个提交内；3) 大多数项目在版本迭代中克隆数量保持稳定；4) 平均0.17%的克隆被共同修改，对维护有负面影响；5) 跨项目克隆普遍，Java项目比C项目更多，但共同修改很少（0.02%）。

Conclusion: 代码克隆在IIoT OSS项目中普遍存在且比例较高，可能对软件维护产生负面影响，需要解决这些问题以提高整体软件质量。

Abstract: Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) has become a prominent topic recently, with an increasing number of IIoT OSS projects emerging, also within the Eclipse Foundation. Code cloning is a common practice that can adversely affect software maintenance. In the IIoT OSS domain, developers frequently reuse code and configurations for efficiency, which can lead to code clone proliferation and maintenance challenges. However, the extent and effects of code clones in the IIoT OSS domain remain understudied. This study aims to investigate the prevalence, evolution, and co-modification of code clones within the Eclipse IIoT OSS ecosystem. We collected 90 release versions from 15 projects in the Eclipse IIoT OSS ecosystem, and investigated their code clone situations based on source code and change history using the NiCad tool and our custom analysis module. The investigation covered clone distribution, patterns, evolution trends, co-modified clones, and cross-project clones. 1) Code clones are prevalent in Eclipse IIoT OSS projects, with 16.3% of code lines involved in clones - nearly twice the proportion observed in traditional OSS projects; 2) Most code clones occur between commits, while there are still a significant proportion of code clones that each clone pair happens within a commit; 3) Most Eclipse IIoT projects remain stable in clone numbers during version iterations; 4) An average of 0.17% of the clones have been co-modified, which negatively affect maintenance; and 5) Cross-project clone pairs are prevalent, more in Java than in C projects, with rare co-modifications (0.02%) only in Java projects. Our findings highlight the potential negative impacts of these clones on software maintenance, emphasizing the need to address these issues to improve overall software quality.

</details>


### [480] [ComBench: A Repo-level Real-world Benchmark for Compilation Error Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27333)
*Jia Li,Zeyang Zhuang,Zhuangbin Chen,Yuxin Su,Wei Meng,Michael R. Lyu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ComBench：首个仓库级别的C/C++编译错误修复基准，通过自动化框架从GitHub CI历史中挖掘真实失败案例，包含执行验证的样本，用于评估LLM在编译错误修复中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动编译错误修复（ACER）技术的真实性能评估不足，主要因为现有基准存在局限性：脱离上下文的单文件数据、缺乏真实源代码多样性、忽略仓库级复杂性的局部任务建模偏差。

Method: 提出ComBench基准，通过自动化框架从大规模开源项目的GitHub CI历史中系统挖掘真实失败案例。包含高精度识别复杂版本历史中的修复补丁技术，以及高保真重现原始构建环境的机制。所有样本都经过执行验证。

Result: 评估12个现代LLM在直接和基于代理的修复设置下的表现，发现模型在实现语法正确性（GPT-5成功率73%）和确保语义正确性（仅41%补丁有效）之间存在显著差距。不同模型对不同错误类型表现出不同的专长。

Conclusion: ComBench为ACER技术的未来发展提供了稳健且现实的平台，能够应对现代软件开发的复杂性，揭示了当前LLM在编译错误修复中的局限性。

Abstract: Compilation errors pose pervasive and critical challenges in software development, significantly hindering productivity. Therefore, Automated Compilation Error Repair (ACER) techniques are proposed to mitigate these issues. Despite recent advancements in ACER, its real-world performance remains poorly evaluated. This can be largely attributed to the limitations of existing benchmarks, \ie decontextualized single-file data, lack of authentic source diversity, and biased local task modeling that ignores crucial repository-level complexities. To bridge this critical gap, we propose ComBench, the first repository-level, reproducible real-world benchmark for C/C++ compilation error repair. ComBench is constructed through a novel, automated framework that systematically mines real-world failures from the GitHub CI histories of large-scale open-source projects. Our framework contributes techniques for the high-precision identification of ground-truth repair patches from complex version histories and a high-fidelity mechanism for reproducing the original, ephemeral build environments. To ensure data quality, all samples in ComBench are execution-verified -- guaranteeing reproducible failures and build success with ground-truth patches. Using ComBench, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 12 modern LLMs under both direct and agent-based repair settings. Our experiments reveal a significant gap between a model's ability to achieve syntactic correctness (a 73% success rate for GPT-5) and its ability to ensure semantic correctness (only 41% of its patches are valid). We also find that different models exhibit distinct specializations for different error types. ComBench provides a robust and realistic platform to guide the future development of ACER techniques capable of addressing the complexities of modern software development.

</details>


### [481] [Safer Builders, Risky Maintainers: A Comparative Study of Breaking Changes in Human vs Agentic PRs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27524)
*K M Ferdous,Dipayan Banik,Kowshik Chowdhury,Shazibul Islam Shamim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI编码代理在生成PR时整体上比人类引入更少的破坏性变更（3.45% vs 7.40%），但在维护任务中风险更高，重构和杂项变更的破坏率分别达6.72%和9.35%，且存在"信心陷阱"现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管AI编码代理提高了开发效率，但其生成的代码通常比人类代码有更多bug和安全问题。虽然人类PR经常破坏向后兼容性，但AI代理PR引入破坏性变更的风险尚未充分研究。本文旨在帮助开发者和研究者评估AI生成PR的可靠性。

Method: 对AIDev数据集中Python仓库的7,191个AI生成PR和1,402个人类PR进行对比分析。开发了一个工具来分析提交中的代码变更，利用基于抽象语法树（AST）的分析来检测潜在的破坏性变更。

Result: AI代理整体上比人类引入更少的破坏性变更（3.45% vs 7.40%）。但在维护任务中风险显著更高：重构变更的破坏率为6.72%，杂项变更为9.35%。还发现了"信心陷阱"现象，即高置信度的AI PR仍会引入破坏性变更。

Conclusion: AI编码代理在代码生成任务中相对安全，但在维护任务中风险较高。无论AI报告的置信度如何，都需要对维护导向的变更进行更严格的审查。研究为评估AI生成PR的可靠性提供了实证基础。

Abstract: AI coding agents are increasingly integrated into modern software engineering workflows, actively collaborating with human developers to create pull requests (PRs) in open-source repositories. Although coding agents improve developer productivity, they often generate code with more bugs and security issues than human-authored code. While human-authored PRs often break backward compatibility, leading to breaking changes, the potential for agentic PRs to introduce breaking changes remains underexplored. The goal of this paper is to help developers and researchers evaluate the reliability of AI-generated PRs by examining the frequency and task contexts in which AI agents introduce breaking changes. We conduct a comparative analysis of 7,191 agent-generated PRs with 1402 human-authored PRs from Python repositories in the AIDev dataset. We develop a tool that analyzes code changes in commits corresponding to the agentic PRs and leverages an abstract syntax tree (AST) based analysis to detect potential breaking changes. Our findings show that AI agents introduce fewer breaking changes overall than humans (3.45% vs. 7.40%) in code generation tasks. However, agents exhibit substantially higher risk during maintenance tasks, with refactoring and chore changes introducing breaking changes at rates of 6.72% and 9.35%, respectively. We also identify a "Confidence Trap" where highly confident agentic PRs still introduce breaking changes, indicating the need for stricter review during maintenance oriented changes regardless of reported confidence score.

</details>


### [482] [Understanding NPM Malicious Package Detection: A Benchmark-Driven Empirical Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27549)
*Wenbo Guo,Zhongwen Chen,Zhengzi Xu,Chengwei Liu,Ming Kang,Shiwen Song,Chengyue Liu,Yijia Xu,Weisong Sun,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对NPM生态系统恶意软件检测工具进行基准测试分析，构建包含恶意和良性包的数据集，评估8个工具的13个变体，发现工具性能受结构机制决定，最佳组合可达96.08%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NPM生态系统已成为软件供应链攻击的主要目标，但现有检测工具在不相容的数据集上孤立评估，导致跨工具比较不可靠。需要系统性的基准测试来理解不同检测工具的实际性能。

Method: 构建包含6,420个恶意包和7,288个良性包的数据集，标注11种行为类别和8种规避技术。评估8个工具的13个变体，不仅进行定量评估，还通过源代码检查揭示工具性能背后的结构机制。

Result: 1. 工具精度-召回率位置由结构机制决定，GuardDog达到最佳平衡（93.32% F1）；2. 单个API调用无方向意图，但行为链可区分恶意目的；3. 大多数恶意软件无需规避，因生态系统缺乏强制预发布扫描；4. ML性能下降源于概念收敛而非概念漂移；5. 工具组合效果取决于互补性而非范式多样性，最佳组合达96.08%准确率和95.79% F1。

Conclusion: NPM恶意软件检测工具的性能受其结构机制决定，行为链分析比单个API调用更有效，生态系统缺乏强制扫描导致恶意软件无需复杂规避，工具组合应注重互补性而非多样性。研究提供了公开的基准测试和评估框架。

Abstract: The NPM ecosystem has become a primary target for software supply chain attacks, yet existing detection tools are evaluated in isolation on incompatible datasets, making cross-tool comparison unreliable. We conduct a benchmark-driven empirical analysis of NPM malware detection, building a dataset of 6,420 malicious and 7,288 benign packages annotated with 11 behavior categories and 8 evasion techniques, and evaluating 8 tools across 13 variants. Unlike prior work, we complement quantitative evaluation with source-code inspection of each tool to expose the structural mechanisms behind its performance.
  Our analysis reveals five key findings. Tool precision-recall positions are structurally determined by how each tool resolves the ambiguity between what code can do and what it intends to do, with GuardDog achieving the best balance at 93.32% F1. A single API call carries no directional intent, but a behavioral chain such as collecting environment variables, serializing, and exfiltrating disambiguates malicious purpose, raising SAP_DT detection from 3.2% to 79.3%. Most malware requires no evasion because the ecosystem lacks mandatory pre-publication scanning. ML degradation stems from concept convergence rather than concept drift: malware became simpler and statistically indistinguishable from benign code in feature space. Tool combination effectiveness is governed by complementarity minus false-positive introduction, not paradigm diversity, with strategic combinations reaching 96.08% accuracy and 95.79% F1. Our benchmark and evaluation framework are publicly available.

</details>


### [483] [Advancing Evidence-Based Social Sustainability in Software Engineering: A Research Roadmap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27735)
*Bimpe Ayoola,Anielle Andrade,Ronnie de Souza Santos,Paul Ralph*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文对软件开发中的社会可持续性进行了系统性研究，提出了明确定义和测量框架，旨在将社会价值融入软件工程实践。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前软件开发中社会可持续性缺乏清晰的概念和方法论基础，常常被速度和利润所忽视，需要建立系统的理论框架来促进社会价值。

Method: 采用叙事性文献综述方法，分析现有软件开发中社会可持续性的定义，识别关键方面（社会公平、福祉、社区凝聚力），并进行概念性分析。

Result: 提出了社会可持续性的综合定义，识别了测量和实践中面临的挑战，并制定了将社会可持续性融入软件工程过程的路线图。

Conclusion: 软件开发需要系统性地整合社会可持续性，通过明确定义、测量框架和实践路线图，可以更好地促进社会价值，平衡技术发展与人类福祉。

Abstract: Social sustainability in software development means creating and maintaining systems that promote pro-social values (e.g., human well-being, equity), both now and in the future. However, social sustainability lacks clear conceptual and methodological foundations, and often takes a back seat to speed and profit. This paper therefore reports a narrative review of existing definitions of social sustainability in software development and identifies key aspects of social sustainability including social equity, well-being, and community cohesion. Challenges around measuring and integrating social sustainability into practice are conceptually analyzed. The paper then proposes a comprehensive definition of social sustainability and outlines a roadmap for measuring and integrating social sustainability into software engineering processes.

</details>


### [484] [Needle in the Repo: A Benchmark for Maintainability in AI-Generated Repository Edits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27745)
*Haichao Zhu,Qian Zhang,Jiyuan Wang,Zhaorui Yang,Yuxin Qiu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NITR框架评估AI编码代理在代码维护性方面的表现，发现现有系统在保持代码可维护结构方面表现不佳，特别是架构层面的编辑任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI编码代理评估主要关注行为正确性，忽视了代码可维护性风险（如模块化、可测试性等）。需要一种能评估代码编辑是否保持可维护结构的诊断框架。

Method: 提出NITR（Needle in the Repo）框架：将软件工程智慧转化为可控探针，嵌入小型现实多文件代码库中，每个探针针对特定可维护性维度。配合隐藏评估工具，结合功能测试和结构预言机来诊断可维护性约束。

Result: 评估23个编码配置（GPT、Claude、Gemini、Qwen等），平均仅解决36.2%案例，最佳配置57.1%。性能从微案例的53.5%降至多步骤案例的20.6%。最难的是架构编辑：依赖控制（4.3%）和责任分解（15.2%）。13.3%案例通过功能测试但未通过结构预言机。代理模式将平均性能从28.2%提升至45.0%，但未解决架构失败问题。

Conclusion: 代码生成的进步不等于可维护代码演进的进步。NITR揭示了传统评估遗漏的关键失败面，表明当前AI编码系统在保持代码可维护结构方面仍不稳健。

Abstract: AI coding agents can now complete complex programming tasks, but existing evaluations largely emphasize behavioral correctness and often overlook maintainability risks such as weak modularity or testability. We present Needle in the Repo (NITR), a diagnostic probe-and-oracle framework for evaluating whether behaviorally correct repository edits preserve maintainable structure. NITR distills recurring software engineering wisdom into controlled probes embedded in small, realistic multi-file codebases, each designed so that success depends primarily on one targeted maintainability dimension. Each probe is paired with a hidden evaluation harness that combines functional tests for required behavior with structural oracles that encode the targeted maintainability constraint and return interpretable diagnoses.
  Using NITR, we evaluate 23 coding configurations across GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Qwen families in both direct-inference and agent-based settings. Current AI coding systems remain far from robust: on average, configurations solve only 36.2% of cases, the best reaches 57.1%, and performance drops from 53.5% on micro cases to 20.6% on multi-step cases. The hardest pressures are architectural rather than local edits, especially dependency control (4.3%) and responsibility decomposition (15.2%). Moreover, 64/483 outcomes (13.3%) pass all functional tests yet fail the structural oracle. Under our harness, agent-mode configurations improve average performance from 28.2% to 45.0%, but do not eliminate these architectural failures. These results show that progress in code generation is not yet progress in maintainable code evolution, and that NITR exposes a critical failure surface missed by conventional evaluation.

</details>


### [485] [EffiSkill: Agent Skill Based Automated Code Efficiency Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27850)
*Zimu Wang,Yuling Shi,Mengfan Li,Zijun Liu,Jie M. Zhang,Chengcheng Wan,Xiaodong Gu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: EffiSkill是一个基于LLM的代码效率优化框架，通过挖掘可重用的优化技能库，实现无需执行反馈的代码优化，在EffiBench-X基准上显著优于现有基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的代码优化方法（如一次性重写、检索示例或基于提示的搜索）未能显式地提炼可重用的优化知识，限制了其在单个实例之外的泛化能力。需要一种能够捕获可移植优化知识的框架。

Method: EffiSkill采用两阶段设计：第一阶段从大规模慢/快程序对中挖掘操作技能和元技能，构建技能库；第二阶段通过无执行诊断、技能检索、计划组合和候选生成，将技能库应用于未见程序，无需运行时反馈。

Result: 在EffiBench-X基准测试中，EffiSkill实现了更高的优化成功率，在不同模型和语言设置下，比最强基线提高了3.69到12.52个百分点。

Conclusion: 机制级技能重用为无需执行的代码优化提供了有用基础，生成的技能库可作为更广泛代理工作流的可重用资源，表明显式优化知识提炼能显著提升LLM在代码优化任务上的性能。

Abstract: Code efficiency is a fundamental aspect of software quality, yet how to harness large language models (LLMs) to optimize programs remains challenging. Prior approaches have sought for one-shot rewriting, retrieved exemplars, or prompt-based search, but they do not explicitly distill reusable optimization knowledge, which limits generalization beyond individual instances.
  In this paper, we present EffiSkill, a framework for code-efficiency optimization that builds a portable optimization toolbox for LLM-based agents. The key idea is to model recurring slow-to-fast transformations as reusable agent skills that capture both concrete transformation mechanisms and higher-level optimization strategies. EffiSkill adopts a two-stage design: Stage I mines Operator and Meta Skills from large-scale slow/fast program pairs to build a skill library; Stage II applies this library to unseen programs through execution-free diagnosis, skill retrieval, plan composition, and candidate generation, without runtime feedback.
  Results on EffiBench-X show that EffiSkill achieves higher optimization success rates, improving over the strongest baseline by 3.69 to 12.52 percentage points across model and language settings. These findings suggest that mechanism-level skill reuse provides a useful foundation for execution-free code optimization, and that the resulting skill library can serve as a reusable resource for broader agent workflows.

</details>


### [486] [Fairness Across Fields: Comparing Software Engineering and Human Sciences Perspectives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27895)
*Lucas Valenca,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究对比了软件工程与人文科学中对公平性的不同理解，发现软件工程主要关注形式化和统计意义上的结果分配公平，而人文科学则强调历史背景、结构性不平等和权力关系，建议软件工程应借鉴人文科学的视角来更好地处理技术的社会影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着数字技术在医疗、公共安全、娱乐和教育等社会领域的广泛应用，软件工程主要通过算法公平性来处理伦理和政治关切。本研究旨在挑战软件工程公平性方法的局限性，通过分析人文科学如何概念化公平性来拓展软件工程的伦理视野。

Method: 进行了两项次级研究：分析了45篇关于算法公平性的软件工程文献和25篇来自人文科学的公平性文献，通过比较它们的发现来评估跨学科见解对伦理技术发展的贡献。

Result: 分析表明，软件工程主要通过形式化和统计概念来定义公平性，重点关注结果分配；而人文科学则强调基于结构性不平等和权力关系的历史情境视角。两者在社会效益、实践建议和挑战识别方面也存在显著差异。

Conclusion: 人文科学的视角能够有意义地贡献于软件工程，促进对公平性的情境化理解，超越技术方法，更好地考虑技术的社会影响。

Abstract: Background. As digital technologies increasingly shape social domains such as healthcare, public safety, entertainment, and education, software engineering has engaged with ethical and political concerns primarily through the notion of algorithmic fairness. Aim. This study challenges the limits of software engineering approaches to fairness by analyzing how fairness is conceptualized in the human sciences. Methodology. We conducted two secondary studies, exploring 45 articles on algorithmic fairness in software engineering and 25 articles on fairness from the humanities, and compared their findings to assess cross-disciplinary insights for ethical technological development. Results. The analysis shows that software engineering predominantly defines fairness through formal and statistical notions focused on outcome distribution, whereas the humanities emphasize historically situated perspectives grounded in structural inequalities and power relations, with differences also evident in associated social benefits, proposed practices, and identified challenges. Conclusion. Perspectives from the human sciences can meaningfully contribute to software engineering by promoting situated understandings of fairness that move beyond technical approaches and better account for the societal impacts of technologies.

</details>


### [487] [Large Language Models in Game Development: Implications for Gameplay, Playability, and Player Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27896)
*Keeryn Johnson,Muhammad Ahmed,Charlie Lang,Sahib Thethi,Wilson Zheng,Ronnie de Souza Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过两个游戏项目的协作自民族志研究，探讨了大型语言模型集成如何影响游戏开发中的玩法、可玩性和玩家体验，发现LLM增加了可变性和个性化，但也带来了正确性、难度校准和结构一致性等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索大型语言模型作为架构组件集成到游戏开发中时，如何影响游戏的核心概念（玩法、可玩性和玩家体验），为游戏工程实践提供实证见解。

Method: 采用协作自民族志研究方法，分析两个集成LLM作为架构组件的游戏项目，通过反思性叙述和开发工件的分析，以玩法、可玩性和玩家体验为指导性框架。

Result: 研究发现LLM集成增加了游戏的可变性和个性化程度，但同时也引入了正确性、难度校准和结构一致性等方面的挑战，揭示了生成式AI集成如何重塑既有的游戏概念。

Conclusion: 研究为生成式AI集成如何重塑游戏开发中的既定概念提供了初步实证见解，并引入了新的架构和质量考量，对游戏工程实践具有重要参考价值。

Abstract: This paper investigates how the integration of large language models influences gameplay, playability, and player experience in game development. We report a collaborative autoethnographic study of two game projects in which LLMs were embedded as architectural components. Reflective narratives and development artifacts were analyzed using gameplay, playability, and player experience as guiding constructs. The findings suggest that LLM integration increases variability and personalization while introducing challenges related to correctness, difficulty calibration, and structural coherence across these concepts. The study provides preliminary empirical insight into how generative AI integration reshapes established game constructs and introduces new architectural and quality considerations within game engineering practice.

</details>


### [488] [DAInfer+: Neurosymbolic Inference of API Specifications from Documentation via Embedding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28060)
*Maryam Masoudian,Anshunkang Zhou,Chengpeng Wang,Charles Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DAInfer+ 使用自然语言处理从库文档中推断API规范，通过神经符号优化生成数据流和别名关系，在Java库评估中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代软件系统严重依赖各种库，但理解API语义在静态分析中仍然具有挑战性，因为库实现复杂或代码不可用。需要从文档中自动推断API规范的方法。

Method: 使用NLP解释文档中的非正式语义信息，将规范推断转化为优化问题。研究句子嵌入模型和LLM从API描述中推导内存操作抽象，然后使用神经符号优化生成精确的数据流和别名规范。

Result: 在流行的Java库评估中，零样本句子嵌入模型在鲁棒性和捕捉细粒度语义细微差别方面优于少样本提示的LLM。数据流推断召回率超过82%，精确率85%；别名关系召回率88%，精确率79%，均在几秒内完成。

Conclusion: DAInfer+ 通过从文档推断API规范，为库感知的静态分析提供了实用价值，展示了基于嵌入的方法在规范推断中的优越性。

Abstract: Modern software systems heavily rely on various libraries, which require understanding the API semantics in static analysis. However, summarizing API semantics remains challenging due to complex implementations or unavailable library code. This paper presents DAInfer+, a novel approach for inferring API specifications from library documentation. We employ Natural Language Processing (NLP) to interpret informal semantic information provided by the documentation, which enables us to reduce the specification inference to an optimization problem. Specifically, we investigate the effectiveness of sentence embedding models and Large Language Models (LLMs) in deriving memory operation abstractions from API descriptions. These abstractions are used to retrieve data-flow and aliasing relations to generate comprehensive API specifications. To solve the optimization problem efficiently, we propose neurosymbolic optimization, yielding precise data-flow and aliasing specifications. Our evaluation of popular Java libraries shows that zero-shot sentence embedding models outperform few-shot prompted LLMs in robustness, capturing fine-grained semantic nuances more effectively. While our initial attempts using two-stage LLM prompting yielded promising results, we found that the embedding-based approach proved superior. Specifically, these models achieve over 82% recall and 85% precision for data-flow inference and 88% recall and 79% precision for alias relations, all within seconds. These results demonstrate the practical value of DAInfer+ in library-aware static analysis.

</details>


### [489] [Compressing Code Context for LLM-based Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28119)
*Haoxiang Jia,Earl T. Barr,Sergey Mechtaev*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWEzze框架通过代码蒸馏和轻量级模型压缩代码上下文，在保持修复能力的同时大幅减少处理成本，提高GitHub问题解决率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM处理GitHub问题时面临两个主要问题：处理大量代码上下文的过高成本，以及噪声淹没上下文窗口导致模型分心、修复效果降低。现有压缩技术无法平衡语义完整性和代码结构保留。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) OCD（Oracle-guided Code Distillation）算法，结合遗传搜索和delta调试，将代码上下文蒸馏到最小足够子序列；2) SWEzze轻量级模型，使用蒸馏数据微调，在推理时压缩代码上下文，过滤噪声同时保留修复所需成分。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified基准测试中，SWEzze保持约6倍的稳定压缩率，相比未压缩设置减少51.8%-71.3%的token预算，提高5.0%-9.2%的问题解决率，在效果、压缩比和延迟方面达到最佳平衡。

Conclusion: SWEzze框架有效解决了LLM处理GitHub问题时的上下文压缩难题，通过系统化代码蒸馏和专用模型实现了成本降低和效果提升的双重目标。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now capable of resolving real-world GitHub issues. However, current approaches overapproximate the code context and suffer from two compounding problems: the prohibitive cost of processing massive inputs, and low effectiveness as noise floods the context window and distracts the model from the bug-fixing signal. Existing compression techniques fail to resolve this tension: generic compressors compromise the semantic integrity of code, while code-specific tools lack awareness of code structure and task context to preserve essential patch ingredients. To address this, we propose a novel framework consisting of two components. First, Oracle-guided Code Distillation (OCD), a context distillation algorithm that combines genetic search and delta debugging to systematically reduce code contexts to their minimal sufficient subsequence - retaining only the ingredients required for a successful fix. We use this distilled data to fine-tune SWEzze, a lightweight model that learns to compress code context at inference time, filtering noise and combating distraction while preserving fix ingredients. Evaluated on SWE-bench Verified across three frontier LLMs, SWEzze maintains a stable compression rate of about 6 times across models, reduces the total token budget by 51.8%-71.3% relative to the uncompressed setting, improves issue resolution rates by 5.0%-9.2%, and delivers the best overall balance among effectiveness, compression ratio, and latency compared with state-of-the-art context compression baselines.

</details>


### [490] [Voice-Controlled Scratch for Children with (Motor) Disabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28246)
*Elias Goller,Gordon Fraser,Isabella Graßl*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MeowCrophone是一个基于语音控制的Scratch编程环境，旨在帮助有运动障碍的用户通过语音编辑代码，解决了传统鼠标拖拽界面的物理交互障碍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解决方案主要关注视觉障碍用户的内容可感知性，但忽视了运动障碍用户面临的物理交互障碍。Scratch等基于块的编程环境的鼠标拖拽界面对有运动障碍的用户构成挑战。

Method: 采用多模态语音用户界面，使用数字覆盖和标签阅读技术，通过多阶段匹配管道（包括正则表达式、语音匹配和自定义语法）来提高语音识别的准确性，支持点击元素、放置块和导航工作区。

Result: 评估显示，自由语音识别系统的基线成功率仅为46.4%，而MeowCrophone的管道将整体成功率提高到82.8%，简单命令的准确率达到96.9%。

Conclusion: MeowCrophone证明了强大的语音控制可以使Scratch对视觉辅助不足的用户变得可访问，为有运动障碍的用户提供了有效的编程交互解决方案。

Abstract: Block-based programming environments like Scratch have become widely adopted in Computer Science Education, but the mouse-based drag-and-drop interface can challenge users with disabilities. While prior work has provided solutions supporting children with visual impairment, these solutions tend to focus on making content perceivable and do not address the physical interaction barriers faced by users with motor disabilities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MeowCrophone, an approach that uses voice control to allow editing code in Scratch. MeowCrophone supports clicking elements, placing blocks, and navigating the workspace via a multi-modal voice user interface that uses numerical overlays and label reading to bypass physical input entirely. As imperfect speech recognition is common in classrooms and for children with dysarthria, MeowCrophone employs a multi-stage matching pipeline using regular expressions, phonetic matching, and a custom grammar. Evaluation shows that while free speech recognition systems achieved a baseline success rate of only 46.4%, MeowCrophone's pipeline improved results to 82.8% overall, with simple commands reaching 96.9% accuracy. This demonstrates that robust voice control can make Scratch accessible to users for whom visual aids are insufficient.

</details>


### [491] [Crossing the NL/PL Divide: Information Flow Analysis Across the NL/PL Boundary in LLM-Integrated Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28345)
*Zihao Xu,Xiao Cheng,Ruijie Meng,Yuekang Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了首个跨越LLM API调用边界的信息流分析方法，通过24个标签的分类体系解决自然语言/编程语言边界的数据流分析问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM API调用已成为普遍的程序构造，但现有程序分析无法跨越这一边界：运行时值进入自然语言提示，经过LLM的不透明处理，重新以代码、SQL、JSON或文本形式输出。这破坏了所有依赖被调用方行为数据流摘要的分析方法，包括污点分析、程序切片、依赖分析和变更影响分析。

Method: 基于定量信息流理论，提出了一个包含24个标签的分类体系，沿两个正交维度：信息保留级别（从词汇保留到完全阻断）和输出模态（自然语言、结构化格式、可执行工件）。在4,154个真实Python文件的9,083个占位符-输出对上进行标注，并通过Cohen's κ=0.82验证可靠性。

Result: 1) 两阶段污点传播管道结合基于分类的过滤和LLM验证，在353个专家标注对上达到F1=0.923；2) 基于分类的后向切片在包含非传播占位符的文件中平均减少15%的切片大小；3) 发现四个阻断标签几乎涵盖了所有非传播情况，为工具构建者提供了可操作的过滤标准。

Conclusion: 该研究首次实现了跨越NL/PL边界的信息流分析，提出的分类体系在真实世界应用中表现出色，为程序分析工具处理LLM API调用提供了理论基础和实践框架。

Abstract: LLM API calls are becoming a ubiquitous program construct, yet they create a boundary that no existing program analysis can cross: runtime values enter a natural-language prompt, undergo opaque processing inside the LLM, and re-emerge as code, SQL, JSON, or text that the program consumes. Every analysis that tracks data across function boundaries, including taint analysis, program slicing, dependency analysis, and change-impact analysis, relies on dataflow summaries of callee behavior. LLM calls have no such summaries, breaking all of these analyses at what we call the NL/PL boundary.
  We present the first information flow method to bridge this boundary. Grounded in quantitative information flow theory, our taxonomy defines 24 labels along two orthogonal dimensions: information preservation level (from lexically preserved to fully blocked) and output modality (natural language, structured format, executable artifact). We label 9,083 placeholder-output pairs from 4,154 real-world Python files and validate reliability with Cohen's $κ= 0.82$ and near-complete coverage (0.01\% unclassifiable). We demonstrate the taxonomy's utility on two downstream applications: (1)~a two-stage taint propagation pipeline combining taxonomy-based filtering with LLM verification achieves $F_1 = 0.923$ on 353 expert-annotated pairs, with cross-language validation on six real-world OpenClaw prompt injection cases further confirming effectiveness; (2)~taxonomy-informed backward slicing reduces slice size by a mean of 15\% in files containing non-propagating placeholders. Per-label analysis reveals that four blocked labels account for nearly all non-propagating cases, providing actionable filtering criteria for tool builders.

</details>


### [492] [Detecting and Mitigating Flakiness in REST API Fuzzing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28452)
*Man Zhang,Chongyang Shen,Andrea Arcuri,Tao Yue*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究REST API测试中的flakiness问题，提出FlakyCatch工具来检测和缓解由EvoMaster等fuzzer生成的测试中的不稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注单元测试和小规模集成测试的flakiness问题，而系统级测试（如REST API）中的flakiness相对较少被探索。虽然已有大量文献研究REST API模糊测试，但检测和缓解此背景下flakiness的负面影响却关注不足。

Method: 使用流行的REST API fuzzer EvoMaster，对36个REST API进行实证研究，分析近3000个失败测试，分类和分析了flakiness来源。基于此理解，提出了FlakyCatch工具来检测和缓解REST API中的flakiness。

Result: FlakyCatch在检测和处理白盒和黑盒fuzzer生成的测试中的flakiness方面是有效的。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了REST API测试flakiness研究的重要空白，提出的FlakyCatch工具能够有效应对系统级测试中的不稳定性问题。

Abstract: Test flakiness is a common problem in industry, which hinders the reliability of automated build and testing workflows. Most existing research on test flakiness has primarily focused on unit and small-scale integration tests. In contrast, flakiness in system-level testing such as REST APIs are comparatively under-explored. A large body of literature has been dedicated to the topic of fuzzing REST APIs, whereas relatively little attention has been paid to detecting and possibly mitigating negative effects of flakiness in this context. To fill this major gap, in this paper, we study the flakiness of tests generated by one of the popularly applied REST API fuzzer in the literature, namely EvoMaster, conduct empirical studies with a corpus of 36 REST APIs to understand flakiness of REST APIs. Based on the results of the empirical studies, we categorize and analyze flakiness sources by inspecting near 3000 failing tests. Based on the understanding, we propose FlakyCatch to detect and mitigate flakiness in REST APIs and empirically evaluate its performance. Results show that FlakyCatch is effective in detecting and handling flakiness in tests generated by white-box and black-box fuzzers.

</details>


### [493] [Debt Behind the AI Boom: A Large-Scale Empirical Study of AI-Generated Code in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28592)
*Yue Liu,Ratnadira Widyasari,Yanjie Zhao,Ivana Clairine Irsan,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对AI代码助手在真实项目中引入技术债务的大规模实证研究，发现AI生成的代码会引入代码异味、bug和安全问题，其中24.2%的问题在最新版本中仍然存在。


<details>
